creator: raob@vivaldi.net
text: I think the summary I chose is misleading folks.  What I mean is that KDE Developers have had Calligra 4.0.0 out since 2024-08-27, and OpenBSD has the package available for installation, but FreeBSD is still hanging on to the previous version, 3.2.1.  Would anyone be interested in building and providing this updated package for FreeBSD, or otherwise, would anyone be interested in guiding me.  I'd be willing to give building it a go, but I'd need some mentoring.
